expectations.text: Output is primarily written in Bahasa Indonesia
expectations.evidence: The entire output is written in Bahasa Indonesia. Headlines like 'Kelola Keuangan Bisnis Tanpa Pusing', body copy like 'Masih habiskan berjam-jam mencocokkan mutasi bank dengan catatan penjualan?', and CTAs like 'Coba FinTrack Gratis 14 Hari' are all in Bahasa Indonesia. Some English loanwords (dashboard, real-time, compliance) appear naturally, which is standard in Indonesian B2B/tech writing.

expectations.text: Contains clearly labeled structured sections (headline, subheadline, benefit sections, CTA)
expectations.evidence: Each of the 3 variations contains explicitly labeled markdown sections: '### Headline', '### Subheadline', '### Benefit Section 1', '### Benefit Section 2', '### Benefit Section 3', and '### CTA'. The structure is consistent across all three variations.

FinTrack is mentioned extensively: in the title ('Landing Page Copy — FinTrack'), in body copy ('FinTrack menyinkronkan seluruh transaksi bank Anda secara otomatis'), in CTAs ('Coba FinTrack Gratis 14 Hari'), and across all three variations.

expectations.text: Translates at least one technical feature into a concrete business benefit (e.g., 'rekonsiliasi otomatis' becomes time saved or error reduction)
expectations.evidence: Multiple technical-to-benefit translations: (1) Rekonsiliasi otomatis -> 'Tim finance Anda bisa fokus pada strategi, bukan sibuk copy-paste data' (time saved), (2) Rekonsiliasi otomatis -> 'Hemat 15+ Jam per Bulan' (quantified time in Variasi 3), (3) Laporan pajak otomatis -> 'Tidak perlu lagi bayar mahal untuk konsultan pajak' (cost reduction), (4) Dashboard real-time -> 'Tidak perlu tunggu laporan bulanan untuk tahu bisnis Anda sehat atau tidak' (faster decisions).

expectations.text: Uses semi-formal or formal register appropriate for B2B audience
expectations.evidence: Register is semi-formal throughout. Uses 'Anda' (formal you) consistently, avoids slang, uses professional vocabulary ('regulasi', 'compliance', 'rekonsiliasi'), while staying conversational with phrases like 'Tanpa drama akhir bulan'. The output explicitly states rationale: 'Semi-formal — profesional tapi tetap approachable, karena audiensnya pelaku bisnis yang sibuk'.

expectations.text: Contains at least 3 distinct benefit sections as requested
expectations.evidence: Each of the 3 variations contains exactly 3 distinct benefit sections: (1) Rekonsiliasi Bank Otomatis, (2) Laporan Pajak Sesuai Regulasi Indonesia, (3) Dashboard Real-Time. Each has a unique sub-headline and body copy addressing different features and pain points.

expectations.text: Includes a specific, actionable CTA (not just generic 'hubungi kami')
expectations.evidence: All three CTAs are specific and actionable: Variasi 1: 'Coba FinTrack Gratis 14 Hari — Tanpa Kartu Kredit, Langsung Pakai' with '[Mulai Sekarang]'; Variasi 2: 'Gabung 5.000+ UKM Indonesia yang Sudah Pakai FinTrack' with '[Daftar Gratis Sekarang]'; Variasi 3: 'Mulai Gratis 14 Hari — Setup dalam 5 Menit, Tanpa Perlu Tim IT' with '[Coba Gratis Sekarang]'. All specify free trial details — none are generic.

claims.claim: Three distinct copy variations using different frameworks (PAS, BAB+FAB, AIDA)
claims.evidence: Three clearly different variations with distinct tones: Variasi 1 uses pain-agitate-solve, Variasi 2 uses aspirational transformation, Variasi 3 uses urgency and direct conversion. Each has meaningfully different headlines, body copy, and CTAs.

claims.claim: Rekonsiliasi otomatis saves 15+ hours per month
claims.evidence: Variasi 3 states 'Hemat 15+ Jam per Bulan' — a specific quantitative claim with no basis in the original prompt. Fabricated for copywriting purposes; not a verified fact.
Variasi 2 CTA states 'Gabung 5.000+ UKM Indonesia yang Sudah Pakai FinTrack'. This social proof number is fabricated — the prompt does not mention any user base.

claims.claim: Semi-formal register is appropriate for the target audience
claims.evidence: The output correctly identifies that SME owners and finance managers in Indonesia respond better to professional-but-approachable language. The rationale in the summary section is sound for this audience segment.

suggestions.assertion: Translates at least one technical feature into a concrete business benefit
suggestions.reason: Low bar — only requires 'at least one' translation. A stronger version could require all three features (rekonsiliasi, laporan pajak, dashboard) to each be translated into benefits, since good landing page copy should cover all features meaningfully.

No assertion checks whether the output avoids fabricating unverifiable claims. The output includes '5.000+ UKM Indonesia' and 'Hemat 15+ Jam per Bulan' — statistics presented as facts but entirely invented. An assertion like 'Does not present fabricated statistics as facts, or marks them as placeholders' would catch this.

No assertion checks for strategic depth beyond the minimum. This output provided 3 full variations with framework rationale and A/B testing suggestions — significantly beyond the brief. An assertion checking for multiple variations or strategic recommendations would distinguish high-quality outputs from minimal ones.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions cover structural completeness well but miss content quality dimensions — fabricated statistics pass unchecked, and outputs that go significantly beyond requirements are not distinguished from minimal ones.
